description: The bright customizable template is the perfect way to onboard new employees. Hiring managers and human resource departments can send a warm welcome to new employees sharing information about the first day, company resources, policies,  people on staff, and tools. This template is part of our Human Resources Collection. All BEE templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.
